content: {"name": "Verdant Cycle", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment \u2014 Saga", "oracle_text": "I \u2014 Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.\nII \u2014 Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.\nIII \u2014 You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. If you do, it gains haste until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "From seed to sprout to mighty oak, nature's eternal dance continues unbroken.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "This Saga represents green's themes of growth, ramp, and creature development. Chapter I provides land ramp (classic green). Chapter II strengthens existing creatures with +1/+1 counters (green's creature enhancement). Chapter III allows cheating creatures into play with haste (green can access creatures from hand, and the haste helps the creature be immediately relevant). The mana cost of 2GG makes this a committed green card appropriate for rare complexity. Each chapter scales with the game state - early ramp, mid-game board development, late-game explosive plays."}
